hero.subtitle: A hybrid cooperative and betrayal card game for 4 to 8 players.

universe.title: The Universe
universe.body: In an enchanted garden, Gardeners cooperate to bloom five legendary flowers. But among them lurk Thorns, ready to do anything to sabotage the bloom without revealing themselves.

rules.title: The Rules
rules.subtitle: Easy to learn, impossible to master
rules.step1_body: Gardener or Thorn — only you know your side.
rules.step2_body: Resources, sabotages, shields: every card counts.
rules.step3_body: At the end of each flower, betrayal can be exposed.

leaderboard.subtitle: The best Gardeners of the season
